title: [codereview-pass2-round2] Security: Added CONFIG_ESP_WIFI_ENABLE_WPA3_SAE=y but no explicit credential management or connection code in main.c; WiFi STA connection logic missing for border router (see project-LICHEN-79pj)
description: No wifi_mgmt_connect() or net_mgmt call in lichen/apps/gateway/src/main.c for the STA mode. Kconfig alone insufficient. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-ros5 project-LICHEN-p12e
